overview: The music room is still provisional. For now it holds the source repo's intended cue slots so the archive has a clear sonic structure waiting for final uploads.

collectionNotes.Core Themes: These shelves define the project's first recognizable sonic identity before the track list grows outward.
collectionNotes.Institutional Motifs: Reserve these slots for cues tied to power structures, continuity, and pressure rather than generic ambience.

tracks.title: Main Theme Placeholder
tracks.summary: The principal musical statement for Magiarchy once the final theme exists.
tracks.note: The main cue should introduce ancient structure, hidden danger, and the feeling of a world held together by controlled pressure.

tracks.title: MSF Motif Placeholder
tracks.summary: A recurring cue for MSF as continuity structure, intelligence grammar, and institutional pressure engine.
tracks.note: This track should feel disciplined and loaded, not loudly militarized.
